'''Unets''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] insectoid [[Species/Legends|species]]. They had four arms and spoke a language called [[Une]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], their homeworld was conquered by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="LOE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
